name: AI Profit Blueprint
tagline: Put AI to work in your business in 5 days.
styleSignature: Premium cinematic 3D tech concept art, dramatic studio lighting with soft volumetric glow and crisp rim light, deep midnight-navy background (#0a0e17 and #131d33) with electric-blue (#3b82f6) and cyan (#22d3ee) energy accents and warm gold (#f5b942) highlights, clean glossy surfaces with subtle floating data particles and faint circuit texture, sophisticated trustworthy futuristic-business mood, sharp focal point and layered depth. No text, no words, no letters.
styleSignatureWhiteBg: Premium polished 3D vector render, clean even studio lighting with soft glow, electric-blue (#3b82f6) to cyan (#22d3ee) gradient with a warm gold (#f5b942) accent, glossy crisp surfaces, sophisticated futuristic-business style, single centered isolated subject. Solid pure pure-white seamless studio background, brightly lit, no dark environment, no scenery, no cast shadow, no reflection on the background. No text, no words, no letters.
_signatureNote: Use styleSignature for full scenes/heroes/backgrounds (dark navy). Use styleSignatureWhiteBg for any asset that will be keyed out to transparent (logo, mark, icons, chrome, host/avatars, seal, buttons) — the main signature's navy background fights keyout. Always prepend the chosen signature to the subjectPrompt.
